title: thelocactus hastifer
intro: Thelocactus hastifer is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae, native to Mexico and characterized by its globular stems and vibrant yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and combat infections due to its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Thelocactus hastifer include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used to create ointments, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
